global_description: A medium-sized, plump bird with a stout body and short tail. It features a predominantly rosy-red plumage with grayish wings and back. The bird has a thick, conical bill and a rounded head.

part_details.plumage: Predominantly rosy-red with a soft texture, covering most of the body.
part_details.wings: Grayish with a subtle pattern, short and rounded.
part_details.bill: Thick, conical, and pale, suited for seed eating.
part_details.tail: Short and slightly notched, matching the body color.
part_details.head: Rounded with a rosy-red hue, blending into the body.

spatial_relations: The thick conical bill is positioned at the front of the rounded head.
The grayish wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
